requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for BESS Power Conversion System (PCS / Storage Inverter)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统并网要求（储能变流器/PCS侧）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統並網要求（儲能變流器／PCS側）

summary.en: BESS storage inverters (PCS) connecting to EU grids must comply with EN 50549-1 (low voltage, ≤16 A/phase) or EN 50549-2 (medium voltage), which specify requirements for generating plants up to 75 kVA and above connected in parallel with the public distribution network, including voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive power capability, anti-islanding, and reconnection limits. Additionally, national grid codes apply depending on the member state: VDE-AR-N 4105 (Germany, LV) and VDE-AR-N 4110 (Germany, MV/HV), Engineering Recommendation G99 (Great Britain), among others. At the EU level, Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (Requirements for Generators, RfG) sets binding requirements for power-generating modules above the thresholds defined by each member state, covering fault ride-through, frequency response, and reactive power exchange.
summary.zh: 接入欧盟电网的储能变流器（PCS）须符合EN 50549-1（低压，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中压）标准，规定了并联接入公共配电网的发电装置（≤75 kVA及以上）的电压/频率穿越、无功功率能力、孤岛保护及重新并网要求。同时须遵守各成员国国家电网规程：德国VDE-AR-N 4105（低压）和VDE-AR-N 4110（中/高压），英国工程推荐标准G99等。欧盟层面，欧盟委员会法规（EU）2016/631（发电机要求，RfG）对超过各成员国规定阈值的发电模块设定了具有约束力的故障穿越、频率响应和无功功率交换要求。
summary.zht: 接入歐盟電網的儲能變流器（PCS）須符合EN 50549-1（低壓，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中壓）標準，規定了並聯接入公共配電網的發電裝置（≤75 kVA及以上）的電壓／頻率穿越、無功功率能力、孤島保護及重新並網要求。同時須遵守各成員國國家電網規程：德國VDE-AR-N 4105（低壓）和VDE-AR-N 4110（中／高壓），英國工程推薦標準G99等。歐盟層面，歐盟委員會法規（EU）2016/631（發電機要求，RfG）對超過各成員國規定閾值的發電模組設定了具有約束力的故障穿越、頻率響應和無功功率交換要求。

standards_or_laws: Engineering Recommendation G99 Issue 2 (Energy Networks Association, Great Britain)

summary.en: In China, grid-connected storage inverters (PCS) are governed primarily by GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System), which superseded GB/T 34120-2017. The 2023 revision extended the AC output voltage upper limit to 35 kV, added fault ride-through (LVRT/HVRT) and primary frequency response requirements, and updated product classification. GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Power Station Connected to Power System) is sometimes referenced for inverter grid-connection behaviour. The National Energy Administration (NEA) and grid companies (State Grid / Southern Grid) also issue enterprise standards (Q/GDW series) for energy storage grid connection.
summary.zh: 中国并网储能变流器（PCS）主要依据GB/T 34120-2023《电化学储能系统储能变流器技术要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），规定了PCS的电气性能、并网保护、孤岛检测及通信接口要求。2023年修订版将交流输出电压上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次调频要求，并更新了产品分类。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定》有时也被参考用于逆变器并网行为。国家能源局及电网企业（国家电网/南方电网）还发布Q/GDW系列企业标准用于储能并网。
summary.zht: 中國並網儲能變流器（PCS）主要依據GB/T 34120-2023《電化學儲能系統儲能變流器技術要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），規定了PCS的電氣性能、並網保護、孤島檢測及通信接口要求。2023年修訂版將交流輸出電壓上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次調頻要求，並更新了產品分類。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定》有時亦被參考用於逆變器並網行為。國家能源局及電網企業（國家電網／南方電網）還發布Q/GDW系列企業標準用於儲能並網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34120-2023 — Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System (SAMR/SAC; supersedes GB/T 34120-2017; recommended national standard)
Q/GDW 1564-2014 (State Grid enterprise standard — current supersession status not publicly confirmable; verify with State Grid or SAC for any post-2020 revision)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 34120 is not accepted as equivalent to EN 50549-1/-2 or VDE-AR-N 4105/4110 / G99 for EU market access. PCS units exported from China must be re-tested and re-certified to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 by a recognised test laboratory (typically accredited under EA/DAkkS/UKAS), and must satisfy the applicable national grid code in each target member state. The EU RfG Regulation (2016/631) is directly applicable law in EU member states; Chinese type-test reports against GB/T 34120 are not substitutable. Key technical gaps include different voltage/frequency ride-through profiles, reactive power Q(U) curves, reconnection delay settings, and communication protocol requirements (IEC 61850 or utility-specific vs. Chinese Modbus/CAN conventions).
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 34120不被欧盟市场认可为EN 50549-1/-2或VDE-AR-N 4105/4110 / G99的等效标准。从中国出口的储能变流器须经认可检测实验室（通常经EA/DAkkS/UKAS认可）重新测试并取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2认证，并须满足目标成员国的国家电网规程。欧盟法规（EU）2016/631在欧盟成员国具有直接法律效力，依据GB/T 34120出具的中国型式试验报告不可替代。主要技术差距包括：电压/频率穿越曲线不同、无功功率Q(U)曲线不同、重新并网延迟设置不同，以及通信协议要求不同（IEC 61850或电网专有协议对比中国Modbus/CAN惯例）。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 34120不被歐盟市場認可為EN 50549-1/-2或VDE-AR-N 4105/4110 / G99的等效標準。從中國出口的儲能變流器須經認可檢測實驗室（通常經EA/DAkkS/UKAS認可）重新測試並取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2認證，並須滿足目標成員國的國家電網規程。歐盟法規（EU）2016/631在歐盟成員國具有直接法律效力，依據GB/T 34120出具的中國型式試驗報告不可替代。主要技術差距包括：電壓／頻率穿越曲線不同、無功功率Q(U)曲線不同、重新並網延遲設置不同，以及通信協議要求不同（IEC 61850或電網專有協議對比中國Modbus/CAN慣例）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 50549-1/-2 are harmonised standards supporting the Low Voltage Directive / Machinery Directive / relevant national grid codes; EU RfG 2016/631 is directly binding EU law. National grid codes (VDE-AR-N 4105/4110, G99) are mandatory for grid connection approval in their respective jurisdictions.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid connection in China — GB/T 34120-2023 is a recommended national standard (推荐性国标) but compliance is effectively required by State Grid / Southern Grid connection rules. The recommended classification has not changed in the 2023 edition.

source.publisher: EUR-Lex (Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631); CENELEC for EN 50549 series; VDE for VDE-AR-N 4105/4110; Energy Networks Association for G99; SAMR/SAC for GB/T 34120

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL ONLY] Chinese PCS / storage inverters certified only to GB/T 34120 are NOT compliant for EU grid connection. Full re-testing to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 and the applicable national grid code is required before connecting to any EU member state grid. Engage an accredited EU test laboratory early in the product development cycle.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器不符合欧盟并网要求。在接入任何欧盟成员国电网之前，须完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2及适用国家电网规程的完整重新测试。建议在产品开发周期早期联系经认可的欧盟检测实验室。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器不符合歐盟並網要求。在接入任何歐盟成員國電網之前，須完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2及適用國家電網規程的完整重新測試。建議在產品開發週期早期聯繫經認可的歐盟檢測實驗室。
